name: Support Ticket Classification
prompt_template:
Classify this support ticket into one of these categories:
- billing
- technical
- account
- general

Ticket:
{ticket_text}

Return only the category name.

input.ticket_text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.
The application crashes when I try to upload files larger than 10MB.
I need to change the email address associated with my account.
What are your business hours for phone support?
